data.acceptance:
1. A rename plan is committed at `tasks/reports/K-04-rename-plan.md` and approved before any rename runs.
2. After execution, all type names match canonical taxonomy: `manifest`, `appManifest`, `envManifest`, `store`, `secretEntry`, `namespaceView`, `webServer` — confirm or rename per TAXONOMY.md.
3. All exported and package-internal identifiers in main.go are consistent with TAXONOMY.md (e.g. if `namespace` is canonical, `appEnv` becomes `namespace`).
4. `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` both pass with no behavioral change.
5. Public CLI surface is unchanged: `thimble init`, `set`, `render`, etc. — user-visible verbs are sticky and only renamed if TAXONOMY.md explicitly marks them as drift.
